Event: The Fearless Adventure
Event Date: 29/01/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: SC42
Path Charmer Scepter

Once in a while, the unit steals 30% max health, spell power, physical and magic armor from 3 random enemy units for 4 sec., and increases these stats for 3 random allied units by the stolen stat value for 4 sec. The enemy units that had their stats stolen also become unable to restore health for 5 sec., and receive pure damage equal to 90% of the scepter wielder's spell power.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
